title: senecio glaucophyllus
intro: Senecio glaucophyllus, also known as Blue Jacob's Ladder, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Senecio glaucophyllus include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tinctures or salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
